mapper.sql: SELECT bi.id, bi.bom_version_id, bi.line_no, bi.parent_item_code, bi.component_item_id, bi.component_item_code, bi.component_item_name, bi.component_item_spec, bi.component_item_unit, bi.component_attribute, bi.component_qty, bi.fixed_loss_qty, bi.change_loss_rate, bi.length, bi.width, bi.supply_type, bi.is_virtual, bi.mrp_expand_flag, bi.source_system, bi.create_by, bi.create_time, bi.update_by, bi.update_time, bi.remark, (SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bom_master bm WHERE bm.parent_item_code = bi.component_item_code) AND (SELECT m.source_type FROM material m WHERE m.material_code = bi.component_item_code LIMIT 1) IN ('MAKE', 'OUTSOURCE') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_child_bom FROM bom_item bi
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bom_item ( bom_version_id, line_no, parent_item_code, component_item_id, component_item_code, component_item_name, component_item_spec, component_item_unit, component_attribute, component_qty, fixed_loss_qty, change_loss_rate, length, width, supply_type, is_virtual, mrp_expand_flag, source_system, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{bomVersionId}, #{lineNo}, #{parentItemCode}, #{componentItemId}, #{componentItemCode}, #{componentItemName}, #{componentItemSpec}, #{componentItemUnit}, #{componentAttribute}, #{componentQty}, #{fixedLossQty}, #{changeLossRate}, #{length}, #{width}, #{supplyType}, #{isVirtual}, #{mrpExpandFlag}, #{sourceSystem}, #{createBy}, SYSDATE() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM bom_item WHERE id IN
#{id}

DELETE FROM bom_item WHERE bom_version_id IN
#{versionId}
